title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Vijayawada location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Curefit Consulting Pvt Ltd!
